Home / Services / Electrical Panel Upgrades

Electrical Panel Upgrades

Upgrade your electrical panel for increased capacity and safety.

Is your electrical panel outdated or insufficient for your current power demands? Many older homes in areas like South Congress and Travis Heights have electrical panels that are no longer adequate for modern appliances and electronics. Nealco Electrical Services specializes in electrical panel upgrades to ensure your home has the power it needs, safely and reliably.

An electrical panel upgrade can increase your home's electrical capacity, allowing you to add new circuits, install energy-efficient appliances, and avoid overloading your system. We assess your current electrical needs and recommend the appropriate panel size and configuration. Our electricians handle the entire upgrade process, from removing the old panel to installing the new one and ensuring it meets all local electrical codes.

We also offer surge protection options to protect your valuable electronics from power surges. Upgrading your electrical panel can improve the safety and efficiency of your electrical system, providing peace of mind and enhancing the value of your home.

Our Process

  1. 01 Electrical Load Assessment
  2. 02 Panel Selection and Permitting
  3. 03 Safe Removal of Old Panel
  4. 04 Expert Installation of New Panel

Benefits

  • Increased Electrical Capacity
  • Improved Safety
  • Protection from Power Surges
  • Enhanced Home Value

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I know if I need an electrical panel upgrade?

Signs include frequently tripping circuit breakers, flickering lights when multiple appliances are in use, and an outdated or damaged panel. We can perform an electrical load assessment to determine if an upgrade is necessary.

How long does an electrical panel upgrade take?

The duration of an electrical panel upgrade typically ranges from 4 to 8 hours, depending on the complexity of the job. We will provide you with a specific timeline before starting the work.

Do I need a permit for an electrical panel upgrade?

Yes, electrical panel upgrades typically require a permit from the City of Austin. We handle the permit application process on your behalf to ensure compliance with all local regulations.

Get a Free Estimate
